search_document:
User Request: Daily order count.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Daily Order Count
Type: chart
Description: Trend of orders placed daily
Title: Orders by Region
Type: table
Description: Count of orders grouped by region
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders placed

sql_queries.title: Daily Order Count
sql_queries.sql: SELECT DATE(OrderDate) AS OrderDate, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY DATE(OrderDate) ORDER BY OrderDate

sql_queries.title: Orders by Region
sql_queries.description: Count of orders grouped by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion ORDER BY OrderCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
